hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: Use fetch(url, params) to get data from the API

hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: The params should be a dictionary with a "city" key

hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: Check if the response has an "error" key before building the time string

hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: Use concatenate() to build the result string from the response data
